    1. apply(HttpRequest.Builder, String)

Interface BuildStrategy

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface BuildStrategy
Functional interface that builds a fully configured HttpRequest from a pre-populated HttpRequest.Builder and an optional request body string.

Each HTTP verb (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) has its own implementation declared as a static constant in RequestMethod. The strategy is selected at runtime by RequestRegistry based on the HttpMethod enum value.

Example — the GET strategy ignores the body and calls builder.GET().build(): 

BuildStrategy GET = (builder, body) -> builder.GET().build();

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpRequest
    apply(HttpRequest.Builder builder, String body)
    Applies the HTTP method (and optional body) to the given builder and returns the request.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      HttpRequest apply(HttpRequest.Builder builder, String body)
      Applies the HTTP method (and optional body) to the given builder and returns the request.
      Parameters:
      builder - a pre-configured builder with URI and headers already set
      body - the request body string; may be empty for methods that do not send a body
      Returns:
      the finalized HttpRequest ready to be sent
